picks.rationale: GEV is up +103% 1Y and +15.4% 1M with a P/E of 31, backed by a record backlog of $163B and 20% of orders tied to data centers. Web search results confirm strong AI power demand with a Chevron-Microsoft data center project using seven GE Vernova turbines, but the stock trades at a lofty 63x forward earnings, justifying a buy rather than a strong_buy.

DELL has a massive +229% YTD return, +235% 1Y, and a reasonable P/E of 33 with strong revenue and backlog in AI infrastructure. Recent gains of +4.1% 1M and +1.9% 1D show continued momentum, supported by political and AI attention.

CRDO is up +164% 1Y, +72% YTD, and has solid short-term momentum with a +10.9% 1M gain and positive news sentiment of 0.36. The strong headline from July 7 naming it a best growth stock supports the favorable outlook despite a high P/E of 105.

VRT is up +143% 1Y and +74% YTD, with strong analyst consensus (strong_buy, an_score 1.46) and a solid short-term bounce (+1.7% 1M). The data center cooling and power story remains intact, supported by a high EPS Rating of 98.

MXL has explosive growth with +476% 1Y and +364% YTD, plus positive 1M momentum of +8.3%. Despite elevated beta of 3.9 and no P/E, the buy rating from analysts (an_score 1.82) and strong news sentiment of 0.17 support inclusion.

META is a strong_buy with a low P/E of 22, positive 1M and 1W momentum (+5.3% and +9.4%), and a solid analyst score of 1.32. The dip from 1Y return of -15% provides a reasonable entry for a hyperscaler with AI tailwinds.

RR. has a +56% 1Y return, +21% YTD, and strong 1M momentum of +14.8% with a reasonable P/E of 21. The positive news sentiment of 0.21 and exposure to nuclear operations for AI data center power support continued growth.

VST has a strong_buy consensus (an_score 1.4) and positive 1M momentum of +6.2% despite a -18% 1Y return. The P/E of 26 is attractive for an AI power demand play, supported by news sentiment of 0.23 and analyst optimism on electricity demand.

LEU has a +3.4% 1W gain and +1.2% 1M momentum, with a buy rating and an analyst score of 1.75. News sentiment is positive at 0.26, and its inclusion in the S&P SmallCap 600 enhances visibility, despite a high P/E of 63 and short interest of 22%.

P has strong recent momentum with +8.2% 1W and +6.1% 1M gains, a +37% 1Y return, and positive news sentiment of 0.19. The buy rating with an an_score of 1.9 and a modest market cap of $26B offer a smaller-cap AI infrastructure growth opportunity.
